title: draba scopulorum
intro: Draba scopulorum, also known as Scouler's cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a wild mustard that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Draba scopulorum typically involve making teas, infusions, or extracts from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
